arts.ttl: Unai Emery makes 'not enough' Aston Villa admission as Champions League hopes diminish
arts.sum: Unai Emery admits he is frustrated by Aston Villa’s lack of consistency in the Premier League, but acknowledges the club is in a process and qualifying for the Champions League in successive seasons was always going to be a huge ask. "It is always about getting balance and trying to identify how we are in each moment," Emery said ahead of Villa’s Premier League clash against leaders Liverpool.
